subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: Verily did Nebuchadnezzar bring grievous affliction upon the Children of Israel, inasmuch as they wavered exceedingly in their faith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بخت النصر هم خیلی به بنی اسرائیل مصیبت داد از بسکه بنی اسرائیل متردد
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @work as worship
